raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "California leads on innovation and technology.",
    "Productivity metrics and profits must not come at the expense of workers.",
    "Workers in warehouses often forgo meal, bathroom, and rest breaks to meet quotas.",
    "Warehouse workers are treated very much like machines.",
    "Increasing work speeds to meet productivity quotas forces workers to neglect their basic needs.",
    "AB 701 aims to restore the dignity of workers in the warehouse industry.",
    "AB 701 will help stop the race to the bottom in warehouse conditions."
  ]
}
```
